subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — and good memories of the conference! A 30-minute call to explore a potential partnership sounds like a good next step.

Please send over a few time slots that work for you next week and we'll get something on the calendar.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information directly. If a senior-level technical conversation makes sense as things progress, we'll facilitate that introduction from our side.

Thanks, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent, Company
